Options therapists work together with clients to achieve mutually agreed upon goals. With a comprehensive understanding of the family's history and culture, therapists work closely with clients, in collaboration with their key supports and influences, with the intention of forward movement on a path toward a positive future. Telehealth services are available. Psychiatric care provides comprehensive psychiatric assessments as well as on-going medication management as part of mental health treatment. Clients must be engaged in active therapy services to participate in medication management. 1445 8th Street Florence, OR 97439 Eligibility: Serves children under the age of 18 in Multnomah County and youth under age 24 in Clackamas County.
